subject: update ansible container server version
commit_message:
update ansible container server version

a bug fixed in ansible server container,
so helm chart in APPC has to be updated.

Change-Id: I50ecdad22718856cfe15e2628ff76978db4d2509
Issue-ID: APPC-1575
Signed-off-by: Taka Cho <takamune.cho@att.com>

entries.message:
